Aesir Medium AA Vehicle
Detachment Card — Reverse
115 Points

A Aesir Medium AA Vehicle detachment consists of 5 Vehicles.

Upgrades

This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 15:

Increase the Detachment size by 5+115 points
Increase the Detachment size by 10+230 points
Special Ammunition

This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

Slug ammo for Clan LB 2-X AC+10 points

                                                                                                                                      Hunter Light Support Tank (3054 Upgrade)
                                                                                                                                      Detachment Card — Reverse
                                                                                                                                      96 Points

                                                                                                                                      A Hunter Light Support Tank (3054 Upgrade) detachment consists of 4 Vehicles.

                                                                                                                                      Upgrades

                                                                                                                                      This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 12:

                                                                                                                                      Increase the Detachment size by 4+96 points
                                                                                                                                      Increase the Detachment size by 8+192 points
                                                                                                                                      Special Ammunition

                                                                                                                                      This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

                                                                                                                                      Inferno-IV ammo for Inner Sphere LRM 15+5 points
                                                                                                                                      Swarm ammo for Inner Sphere LRM 15+5 points
                                                                                                                                      Semi-Guided ammo for Inner Sphere LRM 15+5 points

                                                                                                                                                                                This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades.                                                                                                                                                                                 This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 12:

                                                                                                                                                                                      Increase the Detachment size by 4+130 points

                                                                                                                                                                                      Special Ammunition

                                                                                                                                                                                      This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

                                                                                                                                                                                      AP ammo for Inner Sphere AC/10+10 points
                                                                                                                                                                                      Inferno-IV ammo for Inner Sphere LRM 15+5 points
                                                                                                                                                                                      Swarm ammo for Inner Sphere LRM 15+5 points
                                                                                                                                                                                      Semi-Guided ammo for Inner Sphere LRM 15+5 points

                                                                                                                                                                                                      This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades.                                                                                                                                                                                                       This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades.                                                                                                                                                                                                       Increase the Detachment size by 4+96 points

                                                                                                                                                                                                          Pike Support Vehicle (LB-X)
                                                                                                                                                                                                          Detachment Card — Reverse
                                                                                                                                                                                                          129 Points

                                                                                                                                                                                                          A Pike Support Vehicle (LB-X) detachment consists of 4 Vehicles.

                                                                                                                                                                                                          Upgrades

                                                                                                                                                                                                          This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 12:

                                                                                                                                                                                                          Increase the Detachment size by 4+129 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                          Increase the Detachment size by 8+258 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                          Special Ammunition

                                                                                                                                                                                                          This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

                                                                                                                                                                                                          Inferno ammo for Inner Sphere SRM 2+5 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                          Slug ammo for Inner Sphere LB 5-X AC+10 points

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Upgrades

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 12:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Increase the Detachment size by 4+210 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Increase the Detachment size by 8+420 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Special Ammunition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Inferno-IV ammo for Inner Sphere LRM 20+5 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Swarm ammo for Inner Sphere LRM 20+5 points

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Swallow Attack WIGE
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Detachment Card — Reverse
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              196 Points

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              A Swallow Attack WIGE detachment consists of 4 Vehicles.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Upgrades

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 12:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Increase the Detachment size by 4+196 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Increase the Detachment size by 8+392 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              Special Ammunition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                              This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Detachment Card — Reverse
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                159 Points

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                A Typhoon Urban Assault Vehicle (LB-X) detachment consists of 4 Vehicles.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Upgrades

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 12:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Increase the Detachment size by 4+159 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Increase the Detachment size by 8+318 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                Special Ammunition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Upgrades

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades.                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                   Increase the Detachment size by 4+68 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Increase the Detachment size by 8+136 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Special Ammunition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  45 Points

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  A Warrior Attack Helicopter H-7F detachment consists of 4 Vehicles.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Upgrades

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 12:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Increase the Detachment size by 4+45 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Increase the Detachment size by 8+90 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Special Ammunition

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  This detachment can take up to 3 Special Ammo choices from the Special Ammo list, provided all three are for one or more weapons listed in the Detachment’s Weapons section.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                  Precision ammo for Inner Sphere Ultra AC/2+10 points

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Inner Sphere MML 78"/4" - 20"305+0MissileSpecial Ammo, (Barrage)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Special Rules: CASE, C3 Slave Unit
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Zibler Fast Strike Tank (C)
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Detachment Card — Reverse
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        152 Points

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        A Zibler Fast Strike Tank (C) detachment consists of 4 Vehicles.

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Upgrades

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        This detachment can purchase any of the following upgrades. It may purchase the same upgrade multiple times, to a maximum Detachment size of 12:

                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Increase the Detachment size by 4+152 points
                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                                        Increase the Detachment size by 8+304 points
